description_long: This lamp features a cylindrical shade or housing at the top, supported by three slender, evenly spaced legs that form a tripod base. The shade is a solid, opaque material with a flat top and bottom, likely designed to diffuse light downward and outward. The legs are thin and metallic, providing stability while maintaining a minimalist, modern aesthetic. The overall design is sleek and functional, with no visible switches or decorative embellishments, emphasizing utility and contemporary style. The lamp stands at a height suitable for floor placement, making it ideal for urban interiors or outdoor public spaces. Its neutral color palette and simple geometry allow it to blend seamlessly into a variety of urban environments.
description: A modern tripod floor lamp with a cylindrical shade and three slender metallic legs, featuring a minimalist and functional design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cylindrical shade and all three tripod legs symmetrically spaced.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the cylindrical shade and the alignment of two legs, with the third leg partially hidden.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the shade and the tripod legs, with the central leg most prominent.
description_view_3: Angled view reveals the cylindrical shade and the spatial arrangement of the three legs, with one leg slightly forward.
